rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM M NEWELL et al VS. CLEAVER-BROOKS INC INDIVIDUALLY AND F/K/A et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 14, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT DOUGLASS INSULATION COMPANY INC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Transferred to Department 301, per Judge Woolard's recusal. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SALEH M HASSANEIN VS. FIRST AMERICAN LOANSTAR TRUSTEE SERVICES, LLC A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint For Breach Of Promissory Note And Money Had And Received
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 14, 2009, line 2, PLAINTIFF SALEH HASSANEIN Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint For Breach Of Promissory Note And Money Had And Received. Motion is denied. Plaintiff fails to comply with CRC 3.1324. The facts that are the subject of the amendment arose after the filing of the original complaint and are different than those "general set of facts" that formed the basis of the earlier pleadings. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: TRUST DEED INVESTMENTS, INC. VS. MAHER MUHAWIEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Final Report Of Receiver And Application For Discharge Of Receiver; And Exoneration Of Bond
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 14, 2009, line 5, PLAINTIFF TRUST DEED INVESTMENTS, INC. Notice Of Hearing On Final Report Of Receiver And Application For Discharge Of Receiver; And Exoneration Of Bond. Hearing required. Moving party to explain service upon Attorney Michael Heath. The record does not clearly demonstrate that he is Defendant's attorney of record. =(302/CWW)
